title: can you compare brotalis' performance compared to other dps players? do a full breakdown and analysis

turns.userText: can you compare brotalis' performance compared to other dps players? do a full breakdown and analysis
turns.agentText:

The full stats are too large. Let me query it efficiently — Brotali's account is `Brotalist.3085`. I'll pull their specific stats and a sorted DPS ranking simultaneously.

The rollup doesn't carry damage at the row level — I'll get all account names first, then pull their stats for comparison.

Good — I can see the full roster. Now let me pull `player_stats` for Brotali and the main DPS players for a direct apples-to-apples comparison.

Excellent — I have everything I need. Let me now render the key charts for a full breakdown.
